## reference · short-form video appeal trends formats 2026
* Short-form video is a content format, usually filmed vertically and no longer than 60 seconds.
* The standard length of short-form video is debatable, with Google defining it as any video under 10 minutes, while HubSpot found the optimal length to be 31 to 60 seconds.
* Popular platforms for short-form video include TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and Snapchat Spotlight.
* Short-form videos are easy to make and consume, with an average length of 15-30 seconds.
* Short-form videos are:
  + Easy to watch and share
  + Accessible on any computer or mobile device
  + Cheap and easy to produce
  + Free to access on social media platforms
  + Prioritized by algorithms
  + A preferred format for learning about new things
* 85% of marketers say short-form video is the most effective format on social media.
* 73% of consumers prefer to watch short-form videos when learning about a product or service.
* To create great short-form videos, start with what you have and be authentic.
* Leverage trends and challenges, but be mindful of your brand's tone and style.
* Keep your videos concise and engaging, with a focus on storytelling and visuals.
Sources: https://buffer.com/resources/short-form-video/
